title: AntiFreecam Updated
description: Fork of AntiFreecam, updated for Minecraft 1.21.11
body:
# AntiFreecam Updated

AntiFreecam Updated is a Minecraft Fabric mod that runs on both server and client.

This project is a maintained fork of the original AntiFreecam mod, updated for **Minecraft 1.21.11**.

It exists to enforce collisions when a client uses a Freecam mod, regardless of the player's local settings.

## Usage

Install the mod on the server and restart it.

From that point forward, all players who want to join the server must also have AntiFreecam Updated installed on their client.

When a player joins, the server automatically instructs the client to always enable collisions. Any client-side configuration related to collision behavior is ignored.

## About This Fork

This version maintains the original functionality while updating to the newest versions.
